# POST /api/v1/notifications/templates/search

**Search notification templates**

بحث في قوالب الإشعارات - API-NOTIF-006

Operation ID: `search`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATE_VIEW (found on service:NotificationTemplateService)
